title: Cawston (1) P.4405 Memorial
crew_summary: 4 killed including Flt Lt. Walter Eric Frutiger

external_narratives.summary: News article about the memorial to the four airmen of Hampden P4405 who crashed in Norfolk. The crew, Flt Lt Frutiger, Sgt Chanin, Sgt Hill, and Flt Sgt Gapp of 61 Squadron, were returning from a mission to Wilhelmshaven on 10 February 1941.
key_details: Crashed at Bluestone Plantation between Heydon and Cawston
Took off from Hemswell at 0220, crashed at 0650

external_narratives.summary: Local heritage record of the Hampden bomber crash at Bluestone Plantation near Cawston. Documents the crash of P4405 from 61 Squadron RAF Hemswell during a forced landing attempt after returning from operations over Germany.
RAF Commands casualty database entry for Sergeant J.E. Hill (935567), one of the four crew killed in the Hampden P4405 crash at Cawston on 10 February 1941.
